title: After the Whiskey Peak Battle
description: On pages 1–4, after the whiskey peak battle as vivi, Igaram, and the Straw Hats try to survive Baroque Works’ pursuit while the truth about Alabasta comes into focus.
scene: After the Whiskey Peak Battle. Vivi, Igaram, and the Straw Hats try to survive Baroque Works’ pursuit while the truth about Alabasta comes into focus. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Ugh... My stomach doesn't feel so good...

dialogue.text: But I'm still too sleepy.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: to think that agents with numbers less than 12 were defeated...

dialogue.text: I never thought those 4 would actually lose...!

dialogue.text: But... where do we even run away to now?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: Anywhere's fine, just not here!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Let's just hide ourselves until those pirates leave this isla-

dialogue.text: Aghhh!

dialogue.text: It's the UNLU- CKIES, Friday the 13th!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: W-W-Wait... W-we weren't umm... T-trying to R-RUN away or nothin'...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We were just... Gonna go to the W-wash- room...!

dialogue.text: Even though it's the dead of the night right now, this town is quite rowdy.

dialogue.text: Hmph. I can't believe we were ordered to come all the way out here to the front lines...
